race.comment: ROCKET GIRL (10) I Am Invincible filly from Missile Mantra on debut for the Waller stable. Has shown ability in her last two trials and the booking of J Mac is a good lead to her chances. EXTREMELY TEMPTED (1) Extreme Choice colt from the good producing mare Tempt Me Not on debut for the Waterhouse & Bott yard. Looked sharp in the two trials and expected to figure prominently. KATOTO (8) Wootton Bassett filly from Rose Of Savannah on debut for the Waller yard. Has looked handy in two trials leading into this. Well-related filly who will relish Grima's 3kg claim. Each-way. HONEYSUCKLE (7) The Autumn Sun filly from Sabanci on debut for the Michael Freedman yard. Had three trials in readiness for this and must be kept safe from the good gate.
